title: Yellow Liquid Super Glue, 5 Pack (3 grams) - Fast-Acting & Rapid Dry, Perfect for Small Household Repairs & Bonding Metal, Pottery, Wood, & More
features: QUICK FIX SOLUTION: Get your hands on this yellow liquid super glue 5 pack, each tube containing 3 grams of high-quality adhesive designed for those immediate repair needs around your home.
HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Made with premium ingredients, our yellow liquid super glue provides a durable and reliable bond, giving you peace of mind that your repairs will hold.

EASY APPLICATION: With a precise nozzle and easy-squeeze design, applying our super glue is a breeze. Say goodbye to messy spills and difficult application methods. You can now bond with confidence and precision.

VERSATILE APPLICATIONS: Whether it's metal, pottery, wood, or more, our super glue provides a robust solution for bonding a wide range of materials, making it your go-to for diverse household applications
SAFETY FIRST: Our yellow liquid super glue is non-toxic and safe for use in household settings. No need to worry about harmful chemicals or fumes. Bonding has never been safer and more convenient.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality fast-acting super glue contains five individual 3g tubes of adhesive that are perfect for small household repairs. Safety Warning No warning applicable
